title: Bluebirds Tweaks
description: Tweaks to vanilla Minecraft to my liking
body:
## What is Bluebird Tweaks?
Bluebird Tweaks are tweaks to vanilla minecraft that I change to how I like them. For instant, I changed diamonds to be bluer as well as hearts to be blue. These are a few of the changes (the rest are shown below). Along with my tweaks I also recommend using [Small Held Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items/gallery), [Boosted Brightness](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/boosted-brightness-rp) and [Night Vision Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/night-vision-fix)

This pack is here for a place to archive my pack so I am planning on doing monthly updates or whenever I update the pack.

# Changes
## Hud / Guis:
![Hearts / Hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/035e53b231ab531673fbd14d0fef5dfef73b6f83.png)

### Hearts
- Normal hearts are blue and shaded
- Wither hearts are more like the wither effect icon
- Poison hearts are more like the poison effect icon
- Freezing hearts remove the black heart outline for more details
- Absorption hearts are just yellow version of normal heart

Bubble / Oxygen: The black outline is replaced with a blue outline
The xp bar and xp number (via core shaders) are made to be blue.

Saturation overlay (with appleskin) is made to be light blue instead of yellow

### Core Shaders changes
![Loading screen, item tooltips, slot highlight color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/5f2a5d1f41105ca7c20a5e054dfc172213784e07.png)

Loading screen (if red) is made to be blue and translucent so you can see through it.

Item tooltips are made to be light blue.

Slot Highlight color is blue.

_*Note in 1.21.2+ there is now a texture file for tooltip and slot highlight so core shaders are no longer needed._

### Enchants
![colored enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/845da2b2b93df3edea844d471beee749356d64cb.png)

- The two curses have red text
- Mending and Unbreaking have aqua text
- The rest of the enchantments are cyan

## Items

### Diamonds
![Bluer diamond blocks / models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/34f3d0fb092ba30c564c4e8db073c58a6fc6cfe4.png)

![Bluer diamond items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/6f71788c45fb6a3bd6b88bd66154185498328b94.png)

Diamonds and related items are bluer.

### Netherite
![Purple netherite blocks / models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/b326bec963843395a3e78e4da2a368168f24a4c2.png)

![Purple netherite items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/08487697af9f7710743cb153463f76f618552779.png)

Netherite items and blocks are purple.

## [Emissive Library](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emissive-library) Vanilla Emissive Items
![Emissive items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/liGd2T9X/images/0a50924925f6a3f234539b4773928e2437243469.png)

When using the [Emissive Library](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emissive-library) Resourcepack, these items shown will be emissive *In Versions before 1.0.1.

## And more
Check the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bluebirds-tweaks/gallery) to see most of the rest of the changes!

# Credits
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/): for many of their tweaks
- [Enchanted Games](https://enchanted.games): For a guide on colored experience orbs and other core shaders

# Copyright & Distribution
YOU MAY NOT REPOST OR DISTRIBUTE THIS RESOURCEPACK ANYWHERE ELSE. You can make edits all you want but you cannot post them.
